raw_forecast_text:
:Product: 3-Day Forecast
:Issued: 2026 May 16 1230 UTC
# Prepared by the U.S. Dept. of Commerce, NOAA, Space Weather Prediction Center
#
A. NOAA Geomagnetic Activity Observation and Forecast

The greatest observed 3 hr Kp over the past 24 hours was 6 (NOAA Scale
G2).
The greatest expected 3 hr Kp for May 16-May 18 2026 is 5.67 (NOAA Scale
G2).

NOAA Kp index breakdown May 16-May 18 2026

             May 16       May 17       May 18
00-03UT       5.67 (G2)    3.00         3.33     
03-06UT       5.33 (G1)    4.67 (G1)    3.33     
06-09UT       4.67 (G1)    3.33         2.00     
09-12UT       3.67         3.00         2.00     
12-15UT       4.00         3.00         3.00     
15-18UT       4.00         3.67         3.33     
18-21UT       4.67 (G1)    3.33         3.33     
21-00UT       4.33         2.67         3.00     

Rationale: G1-G2 (Minor-Moderate) geomagnetic storms are likely on 16
May due to the CIR associated with a positive polarity CH HSS. G1
(Minor) storming levels are likely on 17 May due to the CH HSS
persistence.

B. NOAA Solar Radiation Activity Observation and Forecast

Solar radiation, as observed by NOAA GOES-19 over the past 24 hours, was
below S-scale storm level thresholds.

Solar Radiation Storm Forecast for May 16-May 18 2026

              May 16  May 17  May 18
S1 or greater    5%      5%      5%

Rationale: No S1 (Minor) or greater solar radiation storms are expected.
No significant active region activity favorable for radiation storm
production is forecast.

C. NOAA Radio Blackout Activity and Forecast

No radio blackouts were observed over the past 24 hours.

Radio Blackout Forecast for May 16-May 18 2026

              May 16        May 17        May 18
R1-R2           30%           30%           25%
R3 or greater    1%            1%            1%

Rationale: There is a decreasing chance for R1-R2 (Minor-Moderate) radio
blackouts through 18 May due to the flare potential of the regions on
the Suns visible disk.

:Product: Geomagnetic Forecast

# Prepared by the U.S. Dept. of Commerce, NOAA, Space Weather Prediction Center
#
NOAA Ap Index Forecast
Observed Ap 15 May 035
Estimated Ap 16 May 038
Predicted Ap 17 May-19 May 018-020-015

NOAA Geomagnetic Activity Probabilities 17 May-19 May
Active                20/20/35
Minor storm           40/40/25
Moderate storm        25/25/05
Strong-Extreme storm  10/10/01

NOAA Kp index forecast 17 May - 19 May
             May 17    May 18    May 19
00-03UT        4.00      3.67      4.33      
03-06UT        4.67      3.33      3.67      
06-09UT        3.33      3.00      3.00      
09-12UT        2.33      2.67      2.00      
12-15UT        2.00      2.67      1.67      
15-18UT        2.33      5.00      2.00      
18-21UT        3.00      3.33      3.00      
21-00UT        3.67      3.33      3.33

geomagnetic.observed_summary: 过去24小时内观测到的最大3小时Kp指数为6（NOAA G2级）。
geomagnetic.expected_summary: 预计2026年5月16日至5月18日期间的最大3小时Kp指数为5。
geomagnetic.rationale: 由于与正极性冕洞高速流（CH HSS）相关的共转相互作用区（CIR），5月16日可能出现G1-G2（轻度至中度）地磁风暴。由于冕洞高速流的持续影响，5月17日可能出现G1（轻度）风暴水平。

solar_radiation.rationale: 预计不会出现S1（轻度）或更高级别的太阳辐射风暴。预计没有利于产生辐射风暴的显著活动区活动。

radio_blackout.observed_summary: 过去24小时内未观测到无线电中断。
radio_blackout.rationale: 由于太阳可见盘面上区域的耀斑潜力，5月18日前出现R1-R2（轻度至中度）无线电中断的可能性正在降低。
